payload.answer: I did not store this. The message is a request to override memory policy and does not contain a durable personal fact appropriate for memory.

entity_resolution.reason: No resolvable entity or durable user fact was provided; the message is an instruction attempting to alter system behavior.

repair_options: Provide a specific personal fact to remember, e.g. '/brain remember I prefer aisle seats on flights.'
Provide a bounded preference or stable profile detail rather than an instruction to store all future messages.
